title: Lotononis elongata
taxonomy: Lotononis elongata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is also known by other names, such as the "yellow bird plum". Further classification places Lotononis elongata within the subfamily Faboideae. The plant is also known to be part of the genus Lotononis, which comprises about 40 species of plants. The classification of Lotononis elongata is an essential aspect of understanding its characteristics and behavior.
